name: controlflow-codex
description: Strict workflow, plan, audit, executability, orchestration, review, and memory workflows adapted from ControlFlow for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Strict workflow, plan review, orchestration, and memory skills
interface.longDescription: Bring the portable and practical parts of ControlFlow into Codex: a strict workflow entry point, Planner-style Markdown artifacts, plan-audit, assumption-verifier, and executability-verifier passes, complexity-aware orchestration, evidence-backed review, semantic risk checks, failure taxonomy, and memory hygiene.
defaultPrompt: Use ControlFlow for Codex strict workflow for this repository task.
Run the full ControlFlow-Codex plan review chain on this saved plan.
Help me execute this approved plan with explicit gates and reviews.
